// src/pages/Home.js import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import '../styles/Home.css'; const Home = () => { return (

Welcome to CareAfrica

Protecting Africa's wildlife heritage for future generations

Learn More Support Us

Our Mission

Conservation

Protecting endangered species and their habitats through sustainable practices.

Education

Raising awareness and providing educational resources about wildlife conservation.

Community

Engaging local communities in conservation efforts and sustainable development.

100+

Species Protected

50+

Conservation Projects

1000+

Community Members

24/7

Monitoring & Protection

); }; export default Home;
